name: rem2
description: Unofficial — NOT an official Yonsei University or REM2 lab plugin. Built by a grad student who couldn't bear his juniors' daring figures and wanted to ease the pain, if only a little. Consistent scientific/engineering plot styling for MATLAB (axes, legends, labels, time-series, X–Y, 3-D, frequency-response) plus concise code-comment style rules — minimal, algorithm-critical comments with units, conventions, and equation sources.
